items.body:
Reservation Confirmation

Dates & Details:
Check-in: Mar 09, 2026 at 4:00 PM
Check-out: Mar 13, 2026 at 10:00 AM
Nights: 4
Guests: 3

If anything is incorrect, please let me know ASAP so I can update it before arrival.

Address:
150 Sunset Ave, Palm Beach, FL 33480
https://www.google.com/maps/place/26.72010,-80.03819

Parking:
Street parking is available on a first-come basis. Driveway parking is limited to registered vehicles.

WIFI:
Network name: WorkTripWiFi
Password: QuietHours
House Rules:
No smoking or parties/events
Quiet hours: 11:00 PM - 8:00 AM

Hi,

Thanks for booking with us! Your door code is 4004. The code activates at 4 PM on check-in day. Please use the smart lock at the main entrance and message us if you have any trouble.
We are booking while our house is being repaired under an insurance claim after a pipe burst. The adjuster may deliver some documents.
Thanks for letting us know. The concierge can accept envelopes during business hours; just have the adjuster label them with your name.
Please send a quick message after you arrive so we can make sure everything is perfect for your stay.
